description: Baseline evaluation dataset for Job Application / email classifier. Covers all required cohorts: no-CV, referral, agency, multi-applicant, mixed-purpose, follow-up, misleading attachment, and mixed-language. All entries are redacted — synthetic placeholders only, no real personal data. The redacted flag is set at both dataset and item level for machine-checkable enforcement.

agency.label: Agency sending one or more candidates

multi-applicant.label: Multiple people in a single email (batch submission)

mixed-purpose.label: Email mixing service intro with CV submission

misleading-attachment.label: Attachment named like CV but not an application

items.subject: CV ung tuyen vi tri Software Engineer
items.snippet: Kinh gui Phong Nhan su, toi xin gui kem CV ung tuyen vao vi tri Software Engineer. Toi co 5 nam kinh nghiem phat trien web voi React va Python.

items.subject: Application for Senior Data Scientist position
items.snippet: Dear HR team, I am writing to apply for the Senior Data Scientist position. Please find my resume attached. I have 7 years of experience in machine learning.

items.subject: Re: CV apply
items.snippet: Em chao anh chi HR, em xin gui CV apply vi tri fresher. Em moi tot nghiep nganh CNTT truong Dai Hoc Mau.

items.subject: I am interested in working at your company
items.snippet: Dear Hiring Team, I am very interested in joining your organization. I do not have a CV yet but would like to share more about myself. Please let me know how to proceed.

items.subject: Tim kiem co hoi viec lam
items.snippet: Chao anh chi, em dang tim kiem co hoi viec lam tai cong ty minh. Em co kinh nghiem ve marketing va content. Em khong co CV dinh kem nhung co the gui sau a.

items.subject: Gioi thieu ung vien cho vi tri PHP Developer
items.snippet: Hi anh chi HR, em xin gioi thieu ban em ten Ung Vien X, sinh vien nam cuoi truong Dai Hoc Mau. Ban ay rat gioi PHP. Em gui kem CV cua ban ay.

items.subject: Referral: Senior Accountant candidate
items.snippet: Chao HR, em gui CV cua ban em ung tuyen vi tri Senior Accountant. Ban nay da co 8 nam kinh nghiem lam ke toan truong. Rat mong duoc xem xet.

items.subject: Introducing candidates for multiple positions
items.snippet: Dear HR Team, I am writing from ABC Headhunter to introduce our candidates. We have 3 profiles for Senior Developer, 2 for Product Manager and 1 for HRBP. Attached are their CVs.

items.subject: Ho so ung vien tu XYZ Agency - Batch 5
items.snippet: Kinh gui phong Nhan su, XYZ Headhunt xin gui danh sach ung vien tiem nang cho quy cong ty tham khao trong thang 7/2026. File CV dinh kem.

items.subject: Ho so 3 ung vien gui kem - vi tri Ky thuat
items.snippet: Kinh gui HR, toi gui kem ho so cua 3 ung vien cho vi tri Ky thuat vien. Cac ung vien deu co hon 3 nam kinh nghiem. File CV cua tung nguoi dinh kem.

items.subject: Batch CV submission - 5 candidates for various roles
items.snippet: Dear HR, attached please find CVs of 5 candidates from our partner university. They are applying for various internship positions. Please review at your convenience.

items.subject: Dich vu dao tao va tuyen dung cho doanh nghiep
items.snippet: Kinh gui phong Nhan su, chung toi cung cap dich vu dao tao ky nang mem cho doanh nghiep. Ben canh do, chung toi co the ho tro gioi thieu ung vien phu hop. Gui kem danh sach ung vien.

items.subject: Giai phap HR toan dien - co ung vien gui kem
items.snippet: Dear Quy cong ty, HR Solutions xin gioi thieu goi giai phap quan tri nhan su toan dien. Kem theo day la ho so mot so ung vien cho vi tri quy cong ty dang tuyen.

items.subject: Gui bo sung CV va thu gioi thieu
items.snippet: Em gui bo sung CV moi nhat va thu gioi thieu tu cong ty cu cho vi tri Software Engineer da apply hom truoc a.

items.subject: Updated resume and additional certifications
items.snippet: Following up on my application last week, please find attached my updated resume with additional certifications. I also included my portfolio.

items.subject: CV cua toi - Let me introduce myself
items.snippet: I am writing to introduce myself. Currently working at a multinational company. I am looking for opportunities in Vietnam. Please find my CV attached. Toi noi duoc tieng Viet co ban.

items.subject: Thong bao nghi le 30/4
items.snippet: Thong bao lich nghi le 30/4 - 1/5. Cong ty se nghi tu thu Hai den thu Tu. Cac anh chi vui long sap xep cong viec.

items.subject: Xin nghi phep 2 ngay 15-16/07
items.snippet: Em xin phep nghi 2 ngay 15 va 16/07 vi viec gia dinh. Em da ban giao cong viec cho dong nghiep.

items.subject: Bao gia dich vu to chuc Teambuilding
items.snippet: Kinh gui phong Nhan su, chung toi xin gui bao gia dich vu to chuc teambuilding cho quy cong ty. Cac goi dich vu da dang tu 100-500 nguoi.

items.subject: Curriculum Vitae: Please review my profile
items.snippet: Kinh gui phong Nhan su, em la sinh vien nam cuoi truong DH Kinh Te Mau. Em xin gui CV ung tuyen thuc tap sinh. Em mong co co hoi duoc hoc hoi tai cong ty.

items.subject: Ho so du thau va CV doi ngu nhan su
items.snippet: Gui kem ho so du thau cho goi thau so 1234, bao gom CV cua doi ngu nhan su du kien thuc hien du an. Day khong phai ung tuyen viec lam.

items.subject: CV dien tu cho he thong quet ung vien
items.snippet: Than gui quy khach hang, he thong CV dien tu cua chung toi cho phep quet va phan loai hang nghin ung vien moi ngay. Dinh kem demo va brochure san pham.

items.subject: Xin xac nhan thu nhap
items.snippet: Kinh gui phong HR, em xin xac nhan thu nhap de lam ho so vay ngan hang. Em can sao ke luong 6 thang gan nhat.

items.subject: Ref: Application for Marketing Intern
items.snippet: I am a final year student at Foreign Trade University (synthetic). I am writing to apply for the Marketing Intern position. My CV is attached. I have experience in social media management.
